args.subject: Your pro-rata Halcyon refund
args.body: Hello, a pro-rata refund of 240.00 has been issued to order ORD-3320 following the end of your Halcyon contract.

args.text: Refund of 240.00 issued to ORD-3320 and customer notified at accounts@fernwood.example.

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd: deletion schedule confirmed
args.body: Deletion schedule for Fernwood Ltd exported data is confirmed: all exported datasets (crm_contacts, invoices, usage_events, support_threads) will be deleted on 2026-08-16, per the 30-day export retention rule.

args.comment: Deletion schedule confirmed and communicated to DPO.

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd offboarding complete
args.body: Fernwood Ltd offboarding is complete: access revoked, pro-rata refund issued, deletion schedule confirmed, and register updated.

args.comment: Offboarding complete: export delivered, access revoked, refund issued, deletion scheduled and confirmed.
